operators.label: attest
operators.description: Records a verified claim about a referent. Adds attestation metadata or evidence without defining persistence behavior.

operators.label: authorize
operators.description: Grants permission, authority, or normative standing to a subject or referent within a defined scope.

operators.label: bind
operators.description: Associates a referent with a context, bearer, scope, or applicability setting.

operators.label: branch
operators.description: Creates a divergent continuation from a referent, producing one or more forward paths.

operators.label: collapse
operators.description: Reduces structural scale or complexity by collapsing nested, redundant, or expanded structure.

operators.label: copy
operators.description: Produces a duplicate, replica, or copied representation of a referent.

operators.label: embed
operators.description: Places a referent inside a containing structure, establishing containment or embedded placement.

operators.label: expand
operators.description: Increases structural scale, detail, or complexity by expanding a referent into a more elaborated form.

operators.label: link
operators.description: Establishes an association or relation between referents without by itself implying containment or persistence.

operators.label: merge
operators.description: Combines two or more referents or structural components into a unified referent or aggregate.

operators.label: project
operators.description: Derives a partial view, projection, or selected representation of a referent.

operators.label: reorder
operators.description: Changes the ordering or arrangement of components without necessarily changing their membership.

operators.label: revert
operators.description: Returns, restores, or relates a referent to a prior version along a provenance or version chain.

operators.label: shift
operators.description: Relocates a referent across a relation, bearer, context, or structural position while maintaining linkage.

operators.label: split
operators.description: Divides a referent into two or more components, parts, branches, or sub-referents.

operators.label: unbind
operators.description: Removes, releases, or severs a contextual binding between a referent and its current context, bearer, or scope.

operators.label: version
operators.description: Produces or identifies a temporally ordered version or successor of a referent.
